title: Leads Distribution to Multiple Boards
excerpt: Hi, Currently I am using a board to capture leads via a form. Does anyone know if I can randomly distribute these leads among my team (essentially randomly selecting from a list of boards to duplicate each item)

posts.author: Chirsibilik (Chris W)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Currently I am using a board to capture leads via a form. Does anyone know if I can randomly distribute these leads among my team (essentially randomly selecting from a list of boards to duplicate each item)
